---
title: "Spring Boot Task Management System - Project Overview"
author: "Armankarami"
date: "2025-10-13"
format: html
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
---

# Project Overview

## Introduction

This project is a **Spring Boot Task Management System** that demonstrates modern Java web development practices using the Model-View-Controller (MVC) architectural pattern. The system provides a RESTful API for managing tasks with full CRUD operations.

## Project Information

- **Project Name**: Spring Boot Task Management System
- **Version**: 1.0.0
- **Framework**: Spring Boot 4.0.0-M3
- **Java Version**: 17
- **Build Tool**: Maven 3.9.11
- **Architecture**: MVC (Model-View-Controller)

## Key Features

### Core Functionality
- ✅ **Task Management**: Create, read, update, and delete tasks
- ✅ **RESTful API**: Full CRUD operations via HTTP endpoints
- ✅ **MVC Architecture**: Clean separation of concerns
- ✅ **Test-Driven Development**: Comprehensive unit tests
- ✅ **In-Memory Storage**: Simple data persistence

### Technical Features
- ✅ **Spring Boot Auto-Configuration**: Minimal configuration required
- ✅ **Spring Web MVC**: RESTful web services
- ✅ **Spring Test**: Comprehensive testing framework
- ✅ **Maven Wrapper**: Consistent build environment
- ✅ **JSON Serialization**: Automatic request/response handling

## Project Structure

```
taskManager/
├── src/
│   ├── main/
│   │   ├── java/
│   │   │   └── com/
│   │   │       └── example/
│   │   │           └── taskManager/
│   │   │               ├── TaskManagementApplication.java
│   │   │               ├── TaskController.java
│   │   │               ├── controller/
│   │   │               │   └── TaskController.java
│   │   │               ├── model/
│   │   │               │   └── Task.java
│   │   │               └── service/
│   │   │                   └── TaskService.java
│   │   └── resources/
│   │       ├── application.properties
│   │       ├── static/
│   │       └── templates/
│   └── test/
│       └── java/
│           └── com/
│               └── example/
│                   └── taskManager/
│                       ├── TaskManagementApplicationTests.java
│                       ├── controller/
│                       │   └── TaskControllerTest.java
│                       └── service/
│                           └── TaskServiceTest.java
├── target/
├── documentation/
├── pom.xml
├── mvnw
└── mvnw.cmd
```

## Architecture Overview

The project follows the **MVC (Model-View-Controller)** architectural pattern:

### Model Layer
- **Task.java**: Entity class representing a task with properties (id, title, isDone)
- **Location**: `src/main/java/com/example/taskManager/model/`

### Service Layer (Business Logic)
- **TaskService.java**: Contains all business logic for task operations
- **Location**: `src/main/java/com/example/taskManager/service/`
- **Responsibilities**: Data validation, business rules, data manipulation

### Controller Layer (Presentation)
- **TaskController.java**: Handles HTTP requests and responses
- **Location**: `src/main/java/com/example/taskManager/controller/`
- **Responsibilities**: Request mapping, response formatting, HTTP status codes

## API Endpoints

| Method | Endpoint | Description | Status Code |
|--------|----------|-------------|-------------|
| GET | `/tasks` | Get all tasks | 200 OK |
| POST | `/tasks` | Create new task | 201 Created |
| GET | `/tasks/{id}` | Get task by ID | 200 OK / 404 Not Found |
| PUT | `/tasks/{id}` | Update task by ID | 200 OK / 404 Not Found |
| DELETE | `/tasks/{id}` | Delete task by ID | 204 No Content / 404 Not Found |

## Data Model

### Task Entity
```json
{
  "id": 1,
  "title": "Sample Task",
  "isDone": false
}
```

**Properties:**
- `id` (Long): Primary key, auto-generated
- `title` (String): Task description
- `isDone` (Boolean): Task completion status

## Testing Strategy

The project implements **Test-Driven Development (TDD)** with comprehensive test coverage:

### Test Structure
- **Unit Tests**: Individual component testing
- **Integration Tests**: End-to-end API testing
- **Test Isolation**: Each test runs independently

### Test Coverage
- ✅ **TaskService**: 7 test methods
- ✅ **TaskController**: 6 test methods
- ✅ **Application**: 1 integration test

## Development Workflow

1. **Write Tests First** (TDD approach)
2. **Implement Code** to pass tests
3. **Refactor** for better design
4. **Document** changes and updates

## Next Steps

This project serves as a foundation for more advanced features:

- [ ] Database integration (JPA/Hibernate)
- [ ] User authentication and authorization
- [ ] Task categories and tags
- [ ] Due dates and reminders
- [ ] File attachments
- [ ] Real-time notifications
- [ ] Frontend web interface

## Getting Started

1. **Prerequisites**: Java 17, Maven 3.9+
2. **Clone**: Download the project
3. **Build**: `./mvnw clean compile`
4. **Test**: `./mvnw test`
5. **Run**: `./mvnw spring-boot:run`
6. **Access**: `http://localhost:8080`

## Documentation Structure

This documentation is organized into the following sections:

1. **Project Overview** (this file)
2. **MVC Architecture** - Detailed architecture explanation
3. **API Documentation** - Complete API reference
4. **Setup Guide** - Installation and configuration
5. **Testing Guide** - Testing strategies and examples

---

*Last updated: 2025-10-13*
